description: User-selectable model ids accepted by OpenAI's Codex CLI via the ChatGPT OAuth path. The CLI fetches its model catalog from chatgpt.com/backend-api/codex, which is a separate endpoint from the general OpenAI API. Source: codex-rs/models-manager/models.json in the openai/codex repo; internal-only codex-auto-review is intentionally omitted.
